name: PragmARC.Randomness.Real_Ranges

array_types.name: Normal_List
array_types.code: type Normal_List is array (1 .. 12) of Uniform;

subtypes.name: Positive_Real
subtypes.code: subtype Positive_Real is Real range Real'Adjacent (0.0, 1.0) .. Real'Last;

subtypes.name: Uniform
subtypes.code: subtype Uniform is Real range 0.0 .. Real'Adjacent (1.0, 0.0);

subprograms.name: Normal
subprograms.code: function Normal (List : in Normal_List; Mean : in Real; Sigma : in Positive_Real) return Real

documentation.description: Uses the random values in List to approximate a normally distributed random number with the given mean & standard deviation

subprograms.name: Random_Int
subprograms.code: function Random_Int (R : in Uniform; Min : in Integer; Max : in Integer) return Integer

documentation.description: Converts R into a value in Min .. Max

subprograms.name: Random_Range
subprograms.code: function Random_Range (R : in Uniform; Min : in Real; Max : in Real) return Real

documentation.description: Converts R into a value in Min .. Max
